rationale: For a comprehensive School Management System (dashboard), prioritizing Authority, Clarity, and Functionality. The design blends the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype with a professional navy blue and white aesthetic inspired by the school's logo. It ensures readability and dense data presentation without clutter.

sizes.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-black text-slate-900
sizes.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-slate-500

surface_styles.dashboard_cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surface_styles.header_nav: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-blue-900 hover:bg-blue-800 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 text-sm rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-900 focus:border-transparent block w-full p-2.5

badges.success: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-emerald-200
badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-amber-200
badges.danger: bg-red-100 text-red-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-red-200
badges.info: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 text-xs font-semibold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-blue-200

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and shadow elevation for interactive cards.

accessibility.contrast: All text meets WCAG AA standards. Interactive elements have distinct hover/focus states.
accessibility.attributes: Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='student-search-input').

logo.usage: Main navigation header, login screen, and print reports header.

student_avatars.usage: General student imagery or generic avatar.

icons.usage: Use consistently for sidebar navigation, action buttons, and status indicators. Size 18-20px for inline text, 24px for sidebar icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Navy Blue (#1e3a8a) and White/Slate color palette to maintain the professional, traditional educational aesthetic.
Implement Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dialogs (Modals), Select, and Dropdowns, but override default stylings to match the 'surface_styles' defined here.
For Print Support, use Tailwind's 'print:' variant classes to hide navigation (print:hidden) and ensure tables and reports occupy the full width with a white background (print:bg-white).
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='enroll-student-btn').
Use Sonner for toast notifications (e.g., successful fee payment, attendance marked).
Ensure the layout is highly dense but readable ('Control Room' grid pattern), maximizing vertical space without feeling cluttered.
Support standard keyboard interactions (e.g., Escape to close modals).
